headshotImage.caption: Prabhsimran Singh, player page headshot cutout 2023
headshotImage.longCaption: Prabhsimran Singh, player page headshot cutout 2023

dismissalText.commentary: Finn Allen c †Prabhsimran Singh b Bartlett 6 (7b 1x4 0x6) SR: 85.71

dismissalComment.html: nicked and gone! Bartlett had Allen on toast throughout, and he now sends him back to the shed! This is beautiful bowling. On a length just outside off. Curves away late and Allen, trying to go inside-out, only manages a feather. Regulation catch for the keeper, and Bartlett has the early breakthrough his efforts have warranted!

image.longCaption: Prabhsimran Singh, player page headshot cutout 2023

headshotImage.caption: Prabhsimran Singh, player page headshot cutout 2023
headshotImage.longCaption: Prabhsimran Singh, player page headshot cutout 2023

dismissalText.commentary: Cameron Green c †Prabhsimran Singh b Bartlett 4 (2b 1x4 0x6) SR: 200

dismissalComment.html: another nick, and another wicket! Bartlett on fire, and KKR on the ropes early! Back of a length in the channel and this boomerangs away from Green. He goes feeling for it away from his body and nicks it through to the keeper. Bartlett putting on an exhibition of out-swing early, and KKR stung twice in the same over!

liveBlogStory.summary: Kolkata Knight Riders vs Punjab Kings Live Cricket Score & Updates: KKR, who have lost both their matches so far, host PBKS, who have two wins in two, in IPL 2026 Match No. 12 at Eden Gardens, Kolkata. Toss at 7pm IST, match starts at 7.30pm IST.
